text: I miss you a little more than a little, a lot more than a lot.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you comes in waves, and tonight I'm drowning.
author: Unknown

text: The worst part of missing you is knowing how used to you I've become.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you in ways not even words can understand.
author: Unknown

text: Distance is just a test to see how far love can travel; right now, mine misses you.
author: Unknown

text: I'll be missing you until the day I finally get to hold you again.
author: Unknown

text: You have no idea how hard it is to stop thinking about you when I miss you this much.
author: Unknown

text: My favorite place is inside your hug — and I miss it every hour we're apart.
author: Unknown

text: I miss your smile, but I miss mine more when I'm not with you.
author: Unknown

text: The space beside me feels wrong when it's not filled by you.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you is my heart's way of reminding me how much you matter.
author: Unknown

text: If I had a flower for every time I thought of you and missed you, I could walk in my garden forever.
author: Alfred, Lord Tennyson

text: I miss you even when you're just a message away.
author: Unknown

text: Some days I'm fine. Other days I would give anything for five more minutes with you.
author: Unknown

text: I keep looking for you in a crowd that doesn't have you in it.
author: Unknown

text: The hardest thing about missing you is not knowing whether you miss me too.
author: Unknown

text: Every night I go to sleep missing you, and every morning I wake up doing the same.
author: Unknown

text: I didn't know what I had until I had to spend my days missing it.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you is not the hard part; knowing I have to keep going without you is.
author: Unknown

text: You left a you-shaped space in my day, and nothing else fits it.
author: Unknown

text: I miss the little things most — your laugh, your texts, the sound of your name.
author: Unknown

text: When I miss you, I reread our old messages and pretend you're here.
author: Unknown

text: Home isn't a place for me anymore; it's you, and I miss home.
author: Unknown

text: The moon is the same moon you're under, and somehow that makes missing you easier.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you the way the earth misses the sun each night.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you is the price I pay for having loved you this much.
author: Unknown

text: You can break my heart and I'll still love you with all the little pieces — and miss them, too.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you, and I hate that I miss you, and I'd do it all again just to see you.
author: Unknown

text: Time apart has taught me exactly how much I need you here.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you more than I remember to say, and more than words could carry anyway.
author: Unknown

text: There's a lonely hour every night that used to belong to you.
author: Unknown

text: I miss being your reason to smile.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you is a full-time job I never applied for and can't seem to quit.
author: Unknown

text: The distance hurts, but the thought of forever with you keeps me going.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you in the morning, at noon, and in every quiet moment in between.
author: Unknown

text: Come back soon; the world is less colorful while I'm missing you.
author: Unknown

text: I count the days, the hours, the minutes — anything to make missing you feel productive.
author: Unknown

text: You are worth every second of missing you.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you is my heart's way of saying it still belongs to you.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you like the flowers miss the rain.
author: Unknown

text: Even a thousand miles can't loosen the hold you have on my heart — I miss you.
author: Unknown

text: The best part of missing you is knowing you'll be back.
author: Unknown

text: I miss you, and no amount of keeping busy has managed to fix that.
author: Unknown

text: You are the missing piece, and everything feels incomplete until you're back.
author: Unknown

text: I'll trade a hundred lonely nights for one more day with you.
author: Unknown
